---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what makes it hard today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like the plugin to do. If it touches a specific area, name it (a skill, command, the validator, the taxonomy, a module, the site).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — example repos, related tools, prior art.
